subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Book as a bounty from His presence, for He is the All-Bountiful, the All-Wise, and hath commanded all to do that which is righteous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الکتاب فضلا من عنده و هو الفضال الحکیم و امر الکل بالمعروف
